scripts.start: node apps/web/scripts/mkcert-dev.mjs && concurrently -n server,next,tls "npm -w @jarvis/server run dev" "cd apps/web && node node_modules/next/dist/bin/next dev -p 3001 -H localhost" "cd apps/web && node dev-proxy.mjs"
scripts.web: node apps/web/scripts/mkcert-dev.mjs && concurrently -n next,tls "cd apps/web && node node_modules/next/dist/bin/next dev -p 3001 -H localhost" "cd apps/web && node dev-proxy.mjs"
